title: VGFlow Data Invariants v1.0
description: RFC v9 D5 — data_invariants block in ENV-CONTRACT.md. Per-consumer entity creation (no count generic). Closes preflight non-convergence ping-pong.

resource.description: Logical resource name (matches API-CONTRACTS.md resource block)

where.description: Conjunction-only filter (AND across keys). OR via separate invariants.

consumers.description: List of goals depending on this invariant. Preflight counts destructive consumers, creates N entities.

isolation.description: per_consumer = N entities for N destructive consumers. shared_when_read_only = 1 entity if all read_only.

recipe.description: Owning recipe goal_id (may differ from consumer goal — e.g., G-11 reuses G-10 recipe)

consume_semantics.description: destructive = scanner mutation removes/transitions entity (need own row). read_only = scanner observes only (can share row).
